quran.title: Qur'an, Every Day
quran.description: Read the Qur'an with clarity and focus. Enjoy full Surah views, tajweed highlighting, translations, audio recitation, and daily verses for reflection.

prayer.title: Accurate Prayer and Time Awareness
prayer.description: Never miss a prayer with precise prayer times, next prayer countdowns, sunrise and sunset tracking, and Nafal prayer guidance, customized to your location.

ai.title: Muslim AI - Guidance You Can Trust
ai.description: Get instant answers to your spiritual questions with our integrated AI, trained to provide context-aware guidance from reliable sources.

faq.title: Common Questions About Quranity
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about Quranity

whatIs.question: What is Quranity?
whatIs.answer: Quranity is an all-in-one Islamic app designed to help Muslims stay connected to their faith through the Qur'an, prayer times, daily reminders, and AI-powered Islamic guidance.

free.question: Is Quranity free to use?
free.answer: Yes, Quranity offers a comprehensive free version that includes all essential features for your daily spiritual journey.

platforms.question: Which platforms does Quranity support (iOS / Android / Web)?
platforms.answer: Quranity is available across all major platforms including iOS, Android, and any modern web browser.

difference.question: How is Quranity different from other Islamic apps?
difference.answer: Quranity combines trusted Islamic content with modern AI technology, offering a personalized, intelligent, and spiritually focused experience - all in one app.

fatwa.question: Does the AI provide fatwas or personal rulings?
fatwa.answer: No, the AI is designed for educational guidance and information based on established texts; for formal fatwas, we always recommend consulting a qualified scholar.

sources.question: What sources are used for Hadith and Islamic content?
sources.answer: We use primary authentic sources and verified digital libraries to ensure all Hadith and scholarly content meet high standards of reliability.

dataSafe.question: Is my data safe with Quranity?
dataSafe.answer: Data privacy is a core priority. We use industry-standard encryption and security protocols to ensure your personal information remains private and secure.

conversations.question: Does Quranity store my conversations with AI?
conversations.answer: Conversations are stored locally or encrypted to improve your personalized experience, but you have full control over your data history at any time.

guidanceRoot.title: Guidance Rooted in Faith. Powered by Intelligence.

pricing.title: Start for Free. Upgrade When You're Ready.
pricing.description: Quranity offers a free plan so you can explore core features without commitment. When you're ready, unlock deeper AI guidance and premium experiences.

intro.title: 1. Introduction
paragraphs: This Privacy Policy describes how QURANITY LLC ("Quranity," "Company," "we," "our," or "us") collects, uses, processes, stores, and protects personal information when you use the Quranity mobile application, website, AI features, video modules (Shorts and Stories), Qur’an tools, prayer tools, and related services (collectively, the "Services").
By using the Services, you acknowledge that you have read and understood this Privacy Policy.

collection.title: 2. Information We Collect

cards.title: Account & Tech
items: Account: Name, email, username, subscription status.
Device: IP address, OS, app version, diagnostics.

cards.title: Usage & Location
items: Usage: Interactions, Qur’an searches, bookmarks, Shorts activity.
Location: City-level or GPS for prayer times/Qibla.

collection.note: Note: Use of our services may inherently reveal religious beliefs. This data is processed solely to provide the Services.

usage.title: 3. How We Use Information
items: Deliver prayer times and Qibla direction.

aiTransparency.title: 4. Artificial Intelligence
aiTransparency.description: AI provides automated responses generated by artificial intelligence systems. These responses may not always be accurate, complete, or authoritative.
aiTransparency.note: AI outputs are for informational purposes only and do not constitute religious rulings (fatwa), legal advice, or medical advice.

advertising.title: 5. Advertising, Analytics & Meta SDK
advertising.description: We use tools such as Meta SDK and Meta Conversions API (CAPI). Tracking technologies are activated only after user consent where required by law.
advertising.highlight: Quranity does NOT sell Personal Information.

dataTransfers.title: 7. Data Transfers
dataTransfers.description: Information may be processed in the United States. We implement Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) where required.

retention.title: 8. Data Retention
retention.description: We retain data for as long as necessary to provide Services. Users may request account deletion at any time.

rights.title: 9. Your Rights
rights.description: You may have rights to access, correct, delete, or restrict processing of your personal information. California residents may exercise rights under the CCPA/CPRA.

metaDeletion.title: 10. User Data Deletion (Meta Requirement)
metaDeletion.description: To request deletion of personal data associated with Facebook/Meta Login:
steps: Log into Quranity and select 'Delete Account'.
Email support@quranity.app with the subject 'Facebook Data Deletion Request'.
metaDeletion.note: Data will be deleted from active systems within 30 days.

security.title: 11. Security
security.description: We use TLS encryption and restricted access controls. No internet transmission is 100% secure.

children.title: 12. Children's Privacy
children.description: Services are not directed to children under 13 (or 16 in certain regions). We do not knowingly collect minor information.

intro.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
intro.description: By accessing or using the Quranity mobile application, website, AI systems, Shorts, Stories, Qur’an tools, and related services (the "Services"), you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use the Services.

about.title: 2. Description of Services
about.description: Quranity provides Islamic educational content, media features, prayer tools, and AI-generated informational responses. AI outputs are for informational purposes only and do not constitute religious rulings (fatwa), legal advice, or medical advice.

content.title: 3. Accounts & Subscriptions
content.description: Subscriptions are processed via Apple App Store or Google Play. Billing, refunds, and cancellations are governed by the respective platform's policies. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials.

muslimAi.title: 4. User Responsibilities
muslimAi.description: You agree not to misuse the Services, interfere with platform functionality, or attempt unauthorized access. Any use of the AI to generate harmful or prohibited content is strictly forbidden.

userGenerated.title: 5. Intellectual Property
userGenerated.description: All content, trademarks, branding, and technology within Quranity are owned by QURANITY LLC or its licensors. You may not reproduce or distribute any part of the service without explicit permission.

features.title: 6. Disclaimer of Warranties
features.description: The Services are provided "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" without warranties of any kind, express or implied, including but not limited to the accuracy of AI-generated content.

payments.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
payments.description: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Quranity's total aggregate liability arising out of or relating to the Services shall not exceed the total amount paid by you to Quranity in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim.

indemnification.title: 8. Indemnification
indemnification.description: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless QURANITY LLC from claims, damages, and expenses arising out of your misuse of the Services or violation of these Terms.

arbitration.title: 9. Arbitration & Dispute Resolution
arbitration.description: Any dispute arising out of or relating to these Terms shall be resolved through binding arbitration conducted on an individual basis. Class actions are not permitted. Governing Law: State of Wyoming, United States.

forceMajeure.title: 10. Force Majeure
forceMajeure.description: Quranity shall not be liable for delays or failures resulting from causes beyond reasonable control, including natural disasters, strikes, or internet service provider failures.

termination.title: 11. Termination
termination.description: We may suspend or terminate access to the Services immediately, without prior notice, for conduct that we believe violates these Terms or is harmful to other users.

deletionMethods.title: 1. How to Request Deletion
deletionMethods.inAppDescription: Log into your Quranity account, navigate to Settings, and select

metaCallback.title: 2. Meta Callback Support
metaCallback.description: "If you initiate deletion directly through Facebook, Facebook may send us a data deletion callback notification."

processingTime.title: 3. Processing & Retention
processingTime.item1: Upon verification of your identity, your data will be deleted from active systems within 30 days.
processingTime.item2: Certain records may remain temporarily in secure backups for legal or security purposes.

privacyCommitment.title: 4. Privacy Commitment
privacyCommitment.description: As an Islamic educational platform, Quranity treats your data as a trust (Amanah). We collect only what is necessary to provide spiritual services.
points: No data sales to third parties

contact.title: 5. Contact & Support
contact.footerLine: Protecting your spiritual journey through data integrity.

whatAreCookies.title: 1. What Are Cookies
whatAreCookies.description: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website.

items.title: Marketing Cookies:
items.description: Used for advertising and Meta integrations, subject to your consent.

metaAnalytics.title: 3. Meta & Analytics Tools
metaAnalytics.description1: We may use Meta Pixel, Meta Conversions API (CAPI), and similar technologies.
metaAnalytics.description2: Where required by law, these tools are activated only after user consent.

managingCookies.title: 4. Managing Cookies
managingCookies.description: You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings or our website's consent banner.

contact.title: 5. Contact
contact.description: For questions regarding this policy, please contact:

contactPage.title: We're Here to Help
contactPage.description: Have a question, feedback, or need support? We'd love to hear from you. Quranity is built with care for the global Muslim community, and your input helps us improve.
